stacks.p1: Fast, responsive pages designed to highlight your service or product clearly and with impact.
stacks.p2: Complete online stores ready to sell: shopping cart, payment, product management, and layouts tailored to your business.
stacks.p3: Custom tools and dynamic interfaces for your business, designed to engage users and provide rich interactions.
stacks.p4: Updates for text, images, prices, sections, and features. Keep your website up-to-date without hassle.

about.title: About me
about.p1: Nice to meet you, I'm Fabricio! From making games in MUGEN as a teenager to IT Supervisor, I always dreamed of working in tech, and I did it by operating a Data Center in Portugal. Today, I combine my degree with development studies to do my best in every line of code, infrastructure, or automation. My journey is driven by persistence, and I keep growing in the area I love within the IT ecosystem.
about.p3: Database with PostgreSQL (Udemy) | Frontend (EBAC) | GNU/Linux Systems Administration (Udemy) | ITSM - IT Service Management (Udemy) | Administrative Assistant (Casa da Moeda do Brasil)
about.p4: React, TypeScript, C Language, Java | Vue, jQuery, Redux | SASS, Bootstrap, Cypress | Git, GitHub | Figma

footer.t2: Thanks for visiting my site and checking out my work!
